title: Hearing notice for 5 CCR 1001-32
summary: On April 20, 2023, the Commission voted to continue the rulemaking process for Regulation Number 28, currently scheduled for hearing May 16-19, 2023, to its August meeting in accordance with Procedural Rule Section V.E.14.
source_evidence: Department of Public Health and Environment Air Quality Control Commission 5 CCR 1001-32 2023-00047 04/28/2023 On April 20, 2023, the Commission voted to continue the rulemaking process for Regulation Number 28, currently scheduled for hearing May 16-19, 2023, to its August meeting in accordance with Procedural Rule Section V.E.14.

title: Rulemaking notice for 1 CCR 301-25
summary: Throughout the rules, the Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards are incorporated. Unfortunately, when other standards are incorporated, were required to comply with a very specific set of requirements. The incorporated standards need to be identified not only by name, but also by date/version, and what is supposed to be included in the rulemaking are explanations of where those standards can be found.
source_evidence: Department of Education Colorado State Board of Education 1 CCR 301-25 2023-00088 05/02/2023 Throughout the rules, the Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards are incorporated. Unfortunately, when other standards are incorporated, were required to comply with a very specific set of requirements. The incorporated standards need to be identified not only by name, but also by date/version, and what is supposed to be included in the rulemaking are explanations of where those standards can be found.
